summary: Iteration 64: Session Enrollment Purple Header and Transformations Page Changes - ALL TESTS PASSED. Session enrollment page correctly shows purple gradient header with gold sparkles instead of flower image. 'What Clients Say' testimonial section displays below pricing. Program enrollment page unchanged (still shows image). Transformations page no longer shows 'Graphic Testimonials' heading but images still display correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: EnrollmentPage.jsx correctly differentiates between session and program types - sessions show purple header, programs show image
StarField component properly renders gold sparkle animation in session header
Session testimonials API correctly fetched and displayed in 'What Clients Say' section
TransformationsPage.jsx correctly removed 'Graphic Testimonials' h2 heading from graphic-testimonials section
Graphic testimonial images (32 cards) still display correctly without the heading
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session enrollment pages (/enroll/session/:id) now show purple gradient header with gold sparkles and 'What Clients Say' testimonials section. Program enrollment pages (/enroll/program/:id) unchanged - still show image. Transformations page (/transformations) no longer has 'Graphic Testimonials' heading but images display correctly.
